players.name: Strapi
players.oneLiner: Open-source TypeScript headless CMS enabling API creation, content management, and AI-powered automation for modern websites and apps.
players.tagline: The Open-Source Headless CMS for AI powered Websites and Apps
features: Design REST and GraphQL Content Delivery APIs to connect to any frontend
Craft experiences and easily manage editing, publishing, and translation
Personalize your CMS to meet your project's unique requirements
Work together easily on code and content
Host your projects on robust, secure servers in minutes
Implement robust security measures to protect your information
Automate Content Modeling, Translations & more with Strapi AI
Cloud PaaS hosting for Strapi projects
Enterprise Edition: self-hosted, enterprise-ready
Marketplace of plugins and integrations
Internationalization (i18n) for multi-locale content
Blocks Editor with drag and drop rich text
Dynamic Zones for flexible page design
Content History to track changes
Live Preview before publishing
Conditional Fields for smarter editing experience
Content GraphQL API for queries and mutations
API Tokens for secure access
Full TypeScript support
Audit Logs for security monitoring
Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Single Sign-On (SSO) integration
players.positioning: Strapi positions itself as the leading open-source headless CMS that empowers developers with freedom to use preferred tools and frameworks, while providing content managers and business teams with easy-to-use content management and AI-powered automation. It targets modern web and app development requiring customizable, scalable, and secure content infrastructure, suitable for enterprises and digital agencies alike.

players.name: Contentful
players.oneLiner: Contentful is a flexible, API-first content platform that enables teams to create, manage, and deliver personalized digital experiences at scale.
players.tagline: Content that scales. Experiences that convert.
features: Modular content architecture for reuse and scalability
AI-powered content creation, personalization, and workflow automation
Personalization tools including segmentation, experimentation, and insights
Extensive integrations and marketplace apps to extend functionality
Multi-language localization and translation support
Real-time analytics and agentic analytics within workflow
Front-end hosting for fast, scalable site delivery
Role-based permissions and content governance
Bulk entry operations for efficient content management
Enterprise-grade security and compliance (ISO 27001, PCI DSS)
Live preview and taxonomy management for content discoverability
Comprehensive developer documentation and SDKs
players.positioning: Contentful positions itself as a modern, API-first digital experience platform designed for product teams, growth marketers, and developers who need to deliver personalized, scalable, and efficient content experiences across multiple channels and brands. It emphasizes speed, flexibility, and autonomy for non-technical users while providing robust tools and integrations for developers. Contentful targets enterprises and fast-growing companies looking to streamline content workflows, increase engagement, and leverage AI to optimize digital experiences. It competes in the headless CMS and composable commerce space, differentiating through AI capabilities, extensive ecosystem, and enterprise observability features.

players.name: Storyblok
players.oneLiner: Headless CMS with Visual Editor that empowers developers, marketers, and agents to collaborate joyfully and deliver content faster.
players.tagline: Your AI is only as good as your content. Make it joyful.
features: Visual editing with drag and drop components
Empowered editors and agents with intuitive workflows
API-first architecture supporting Next.js, Astro, Nuxt, React, Vue, and more
MCP Server for agentic experiences connecting agents directly to content
FlowMotion for orchestrating agent-driven tasks into collaborative workflows
Global components and flexible content structures
Multi-language and localization support
Enterprise-grade security and uptime
Built-in performance tools and seamless integrations
Comprehensive APIs: Content Delivery API, Management API, GraphQL API, Image Service API
Developer blueprints and tutorials for quick start
Dedicated customer success team
players.positioning: Storyblok positions itself as the #1 Enterprise Headless CMS that uniquely serves developers, marketers, and agents without tradeoffs. It emphasizes joyful content management, fast time-to-market, and seamless collaboration through its visual editor and advanced APIs. It targets enterprises and teams seeking scalable, secure, and flexible content infrastructure with strong developer and marketer usability. Storyblok highlights its high ROI, extensive API ecosystem, and customer success focus to differentiate from competitors.

players.name: Cosmic
players.oneLiner: AI-Powered Headless CMS to build, deploy, and scale content-driven applications 10x faster.
players.tagline: Agents That Help You Build, Ship, and Grow
features: AI-native platform with autonomous AI agents for content creation, code generation, and automation
Integration of CMS into Slack, WhatsApp, and Telegram for team collaboration
AI-powered CLI for content creation, app generation, and deployment
RESTful API with sub-100ms response times and TypeScript SDK
AI Studio for generating text, images, and video
Flexible content modeling with 20+ field types including repeaters and relationships
Media management with imgix CDN and AI media generation
Automated workflows chaining AI agents for complex operations
Enterprise-grade infrastructure with 99.9% uptime SLA, 256-bit SSL encryption, and auto-scaling
Granular roles and permissions, 2FA, audit logs, and API key management
Open source SDKs and full data portability
Extensive integrations with Vercel, Netlify, AWS, Stripe, Shopify, OpenAI, and more
players.positioning: Cosmic positions itself as a modern, AI-powered headless CMS platform designed for teams and enterprises that want to accelerate content creation, app development, and deployment with autonomous AI agents and powerful automation. It targets developers, content teams, and businesses seeking a scalable, secure, and collaborative CMS solution that integrates seamlessly with popular tools and frameworks.

players.name: DatoCMS
players.oneLiner: The headless CMS that your team will love — DatoCMS
players.tagline: Simply put, the most complete, user-friendly and performant Headless CMS
features: GraphQL API for efficient content querying
Structured text editor for rich content editing
Localization with built-in i18n support
Modular content for dynamic page building
Visual editing interface for easy content updates
Cache tags for fine-grained cache invalidation
Plugins to extend and customize CMS capabilities
AI & Automation features for enhanced workflows
Worldwide CDN for fast content delivery
Content integrity and workflow management
players.positioning: DatoCMS is positioned as a modern, developer-friendly headless CMS designed to empower teams of all sizes to create and distribute content efficiently at scale. It emphasizes performance, scalability, and flexibility, offering a comprehensive API-first platform with strong developer tools, including GraphQL and REST APIs, SDKs, and integration guides. It targets web developers, digital marketers, content creators, and enterprises seeking a future-proof content infrastructure that supports fast iteration, global delivery, and seamless collaboration across teams.

players.name: Contentstack
players.oneLiner: The industry's first Agentic Experience Platform (AXP) combining CMS, real-time data, and agentic AI for hyper-relevant digital experiences at scale.
players.tagline: CMS plus real-time data and agentic AI
features: Agentic Experience Platform unifies content, data, and intelligent agents
API-first, cloud-based headless CMS for flexibility
Real-time customer data activation and personalization
No-code agents and automations with brand-aware AI
Visual editor and timeline previewing
Integrated front-end hosting, asset management, and personalization engine
Granular permissions and custom workflows
Developer tools including SDKs, APIs, CLI, and marketplace apps
Automation hub and AI-powered content generation
Enterprise-grade security and compliance
players.positioning: Contentstack positions itself as a leading enterprise-grade, AI-ready headless CMS and digital experience platform that empowers businesses to deliver personalized, scalable, and secure digital experiences. It targets enterprises seeking agility, innovation, and integration of AI and real-time data into their content workflows. The platform emphasizes flexibility, developer empowerment, and no-code automation to accelerate time-to-market and improve customer engagement across industries including financial services, retail, and technology.

players.name: Sanity
players.oneLiner: The Content Operating System for the AI era
players.tagline: The only platform powering content operations
features: Schema as code for content modeling
Fully customizable content studio
Content Lake: managed database optimized for content
Multiplayer editing for teams
Content agent for AI-powered content operations at scale
Programmable automation with event-driven functions
Agent actions for schema-aware AI automations
Power web, mobile, and agentic applications with one API
Content releases with precision scheduling
Media library for asset management
App SDK for building custom content applications
Live CDN for fast content delivery
Enterprise-grade security and compliance (SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, CCPA)
24/7 support and 99.95% uptime SLA
players.positioning: Sanity positions itself as a modern, developer-friendly content operating system designed for the AI era, enabling teams to model, automate, and power content operations at scale. It targets businesses and developers who need a flexible, programmable, and scalable platform to manage structured content and integrate AI-driven workflows. Sanity emphasizes customization, automation, and powering any application or AI agent with a single API, appealing to enterprises and innovative digital teams seeking to accelerate content release cycles and reduce manual work.

players.name: Jamstack
players.oneLiner: An architectural approach for building fast, secure, and scalable websites by decoupling the web experience from backend logic.
features: Decouples web experience layer from data and business logic
Improves flexibility, scalability, performance, and maintainability
Enables composable architecture using APIs and third-party services
Removes need for business logic to dictate web experience
players.positioning: Jamstack is positioned as a modern web architecture that enhances website speed, security, and scalability by separating frontend from backend logic, ideal for developers seeking performant and maintainable web solutions.

brief: Mapped 8 players in "headless CMS". Most common capabilities: headless cms, content management, api. Players: Strapi, Contentful, Storyblok, Cosmic, DatoCMS, Contentstack, Sanity, Jamstack.
